completed_slice.action: Add a fail-closed cross-artifact consistency gate for Cloudflare Pages hostname authority.
completed_slice.verification: Four deterministic isolated tests passed using byte-equivalent validator logic: exact agreement accepted; lookalike hostname, commit mismatch, and unadmitted custom-domain authority rejected.

remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN followed by an authenticated workflow dispatch.
required_next_evidence: workflow integration after metadata and hostname evidence generation
served research surface bound to the deployed source commit
next_action: Wire validate-hostname-authority-consistency.mjs into .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml after the metadata and hostname gate steps, include its JSON output in the final manifest and uploaded artifact, then dispatch with valid Cloudflare environment credentials.
